summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Benjamin Kurtz Academy landing page. All sections render correctly with German content, proper brand colors, and working interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Client testimonial cards show placeholder text '[ Testimonial-Text — wird ergänzt ]' and '[ Name ]' / '[ Kontext ]' — content not yet populated
Benjamin Kurtz photo not loading (shows fallback '[ Foto Benjamin Kurtz ]') — R2 bucket image not available yet

issues: Vimeo embed shows 'Sorry, Because of its privacy settings, this video cannot be played here.' - expected Vimeo setting issue per context

action_items: Add real client testimonials to replace placeholder text in TestimonialsSection
Upload Benjamin Kurtz photo to R2 bucket
Fix Vimeo video privacy settings to allow embedding
critical_code_review_comments: Testimonial cards have placeholder content that should be replaced before production
No data-testid attributes on most interactive elements (accordion buttons, CTA buttons, nav links) - limits automated testing robustness
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working: header (sticky, mobile menu toggle), hero (DEINE SEELE headline, CTA buttons scroll to booking), statement section, podcast section (YouTube embed present, Spotify/Apple/YouTube links), WhatIs section (skeptic accordion opens/closes showing researcher cards), ForWhom section (8 topic cards in 4x2 grid), About section (bio + credentials), Process section (01/02/03 steps), CaseStudies accordion (3 cases visible, clicking opens 3-column layout), Testimonials (dark navy authority quotes + light client cards), Booking section (Intro-Call buchen headline, topics grid, Kalender öffnen button links to benjaminkurtz.de/bookings/wakeup), Footer (dark bg with social links). Known non-issues: Vimeo privacy error, R2 photo placeholder.
